'''vadacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ugli|ugli]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-d-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ugli|ugli]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vadacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vædæchæth|vædæchæth]] || [[word:vædæchæj|vædæchæj]] || [[word:vædæchæsh|vædæchæsh]] || [[word:vædæchæ|vædæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vadadachath|vadadachath]] || [[word:vadadachaj|vadadachaj]] || [[word:vadadachash|vadadachash]] || [[word:vadadacha|vadadacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vadachath|vadachath]] || [[word:vadachaj|vadachaj]] || [[word:vadachash|vadachash]] || [[word:vadacha|vadacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vadafchath|vadafchath]] || [[word:vadafchaj|vadafchaj]] || [[word:vadafchash|vadafchash]] || [[word:vadafchaf|vadafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vadachatha|vadachatha]] || [[word:vadachaja|vadachaja]] || [[word:vadachasha|vadachasha]] || [[word:vadachaka|vadachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vadachath|vadachath]] || [[word:vadachaj|vadachaj]] || [[word:vadachash|vadachash]] || [[word:vadacha|vadacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vadachathal|vadachathal]] || [[word:vadachajal|vadachajal]] || [[word:vadachashal|vadachashal]] || [[word:vadachakal|vadachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vadachathatha|vadachathatha]] || [[word:vadachajaja|vadachajaja]] || [[word:vadachashasha|vadachashasha]] || [[word:vadachaka|vadachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vadachathan|vadachathan]] || [[word:vadachajan|vadachajan]] || [[word:vadachashan|vadachashan]] || [[word:vadachakan|vadachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vadachathaoro|vadachathaoro]] || [[word:vadachajaoro|vadachajaoro]] || [[word:vadachashaoro|vadachashaoro]] || [[word:vadachakaoro|vadachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
